# Gemma 4 - Liens de reference

## Ressources officielles Google

| Lien | Description |
|------|-------------|
| https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/gemma-4/ | Blog officiel - annonce Gemma 4 (2 avril 2026) |
| https://deepmind.google/models/gemma/gemma-4/ | Page modele DeepMind avec benchmarks |
| https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/core/model_card_4 | Model card technique detaillee (architecture, modalites) |
| https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/releases | Historique complet des releases Gemma |
| https://developers.googleblog.com/bring-state-of-the-art-agentic-skills-to-the-edge-with-gemma-4/ | Capacites agentiques, function calling, edge |
| https://opensource.googleblog.com/2026/03/gemma-4-expanding-the-gemmaverse-with-apache-20.html | Details du passage Apache 2.0 |

## Hugging Face

| Lien | Description |
|------|-------------|
| https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-E2B | Checkpoint base E2B (2.3B actifs) |
| https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-E4B | Checkpoint base E4B (4.5B actifs) |
| https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-26B-A4B | Checkpoint base 26B MoE |
| https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-31B | Checkpoint base 31B dense |
| https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-31B-it | Checkpoint instruction-tuned 31B |
| https://huggingface.co/blog/gemma4 | Guide complet HF (code, benchmarks, deploiement) |

## Deploiement et outils

| Lien | Description |
|------|-------------|
| https://ollama.com/library/gemma4 | Ollama - tous les tags et commandes |
| https://lmstudio.ai/models/gemma-4 | LM Studio - deploiement GUI local |
| https://github.com/vllm-project/recipes/blob/main/Google/Gemma4.md | vLLM - configs serving, Docker, tensor parallelism |
| https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/gemma-4 | Unsloth - guide hardware, llama.cpp, quantization |
| https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/gemma-4/train | Unsloth - guide fine-tuning |

| Lien | Description |
|------|-------------|
| https://newsletter.maartengrootendorst.com/p/a-visual-guide-to-gemma-4 | Guide visuel de l'architecture (excellent) |
